title: ranunculus neoascendens
intro: Ranunculus neoascendens, also known as Ranunculus occidentalis or Western Buttercup, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the Ranunculaceae family. It is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to soothe skin irritations and wounds. The plant is said to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving wound healing, and exhibiting antimicrobial activity. Ranunculus neoascendens is typically used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and salves, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
